title: twelve independent field edits in one large repetitive file (one read, many edits)
instruction: In the `routes` array, change the `rateLimit` of exactly these twelve routes (identified by their `id`) to the given values, leaving every other route's `rateLimit` at `100`: r-004 ā†’ 250, r-009 ā†’ 300, r-015 ā†’ 150, r-022 ā†’ 500, r-028 ā†’ 200, r-033 ā†’ 750, r-037 ā†’ 125, r-041 ā†’ 400, r-046 ā†’ 600, r-052 ā†’ 175, r-055 ā†’ 900, r-060 ā†’ 350. Change nothing else.
